accepted.reason: Nested pairwise weighting over user logs is a strong loop-based kernel with clear optimization potential.
2D stencil-like pressure/velocity updates provide high-signal numeric loops for Cython conversion.
Flag-gated clamping over raster grids is a practical array kernel with branch and arithmetic structure.

skipped.reason: Pi approximation pattern already exists in current unpaired set.
Single closed-form formula with minimal loop/optimization signal.
Wrapper around external gzip/C parser internals; not a standalone Python->Cython kernel target.
Fractal escape algorithm family is already represented by existing examples.
Large pandas-heavy finance utility module, not a focused kernel for Cython optimization traces.
String-distance and DB UDF utility code overlaps existing edit-distance coverage and is less numeric-kernel oriented.
Integral benchmark pattern is already covered by existing integration examples.
